title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model that trains on video, audio, text, and action data to enable robots to understand and predict physical environments. Cosmos 3 is part of NVIDIA's full physical AI stack alongside Vera and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot.
